name: Kz NTools : Fix Your Network
short_description: Kz NTools is a powerfull network tool. Kz Ntools will ease your network usage and fix your issues.
detailed_description:
What is Kz NTools ?

Kz NTools is a powerfull network tool. Developed by person who hates high ping.
Kz Ntools will ease your connection and help to fix your issues.

Features


  • Just click one button and lay back (Reset your firewall settings, clear DNS cache and some magical tricks) :)
  • Low memory usage
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot
  • Support Non-Steam Games Too :)
  • Show and manage DNS records.
  • And of course we have extras for you :)

Extras

  • Shutdown and Restart Options
  • Shutdown and Restart Timers
  • Change and Reset DNS
  • Turn your network connection on/off
